section_path: Cycle To Work > Process for getting a bike through Cycle to Work: > Can I use Cycle to Work to get a bike for a family member, partner or friend?
text: No, the items you select must be for yourself.

section_path: Cycle To Work > Process for getting a bike through Cycle to Work: > Is CycleScheme the only provider I can utilise this scheme through?
text: Yes, as of 5th December 2022.

section_path: Cycle To Work > Process for getting a bike through Cycle to Work: > Where can I get my bike and accessories from?
text: You can shop in-store or online, with over 2,600 CycleScheme retailers to choose from across the UK.

section_path: Cycle To Work > Process for getting a bike through Cycle to Work: > Do I have to cycle to work every day?
text: No, the government guidelines state that you should use your bike and accessories for commuting for at least 50% of its usage however you do not have to log your bikes mileage and we thoroughly encourage you to use your bike in your spare time.

section_path: Cycle To Work > Process for getting a bike through Cycle to Work: > What is an eCertificate?
text: An eCertiificate is the voucher you will be given once your application is approved. This is how you can purchase your bike or any equipment or accessories.
